title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account, AI models, and preferences.

developer.title: Developer Mode
developer.subtitle: For advanced users. Displays an expandable Developer Panel in the AI Chat.
developer.securityNote: API keys, tokens, and credentials are automatically masked in all debug output.

deleteAccountDesc: Permanently remove all your analyses and data.
aiProvidersDesc: CodeInsight AI is local-first. You connect your own AI providers (OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq, Ollama, LM Studio, and more) and route different features to different models.
manageProvidersDesc: Add API keys, test connections, assign models to features.
aiPersonalityDesc: Customize how the AI behaves across chat, code review, bug analysis, docs, and architecture. The selected personality injects its system prompt before every AI request.
managePersonalitiesDesc: 5 built-in (Professional, Friendly, Technical, CTO, Teacher) + custom.
deepStaticDesc: Run full AST parsing and complexity metrics (slower).
securityScanningDesc: Scan for secrets, vulnerabilities, and misconfigurations.
generateEmbeddingsDesc: Enable semantic code search and richer AI chat.
autoDocsDesc: Produce README, API docs, and diagrams automatically.
aiConfigDesc: Defaults applied to the AI Chat. Override per-feature in the Providers view.
noEnabledProviders: No enabled providers — using the built-in AI. Enable one in the Providers view.
debugPanelsDesc: Choose which sections appear in the Developer Panel.
emailAlertsDesc: Get notified when an analysis completes.
pushNotificationsDesc: Real-time browser push for critical findings.
weeklyDigestDesc: A summary of your analyses every Monday.
accentColorDesc: Updates buttons, links, icons, charts, AI Core glow, and focus states instantly.
animationDesc: Automatically recommend Performance mode on low-end devices.
